action_scenario: playing with a dog in a backyard with a ball, sunny daylight, full-body shot

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their mid-twenties, of East Asian descent, with buzzed hair and soft green eyes, a relaxed expression. soft daylight from a north-facing window. a blurred bookshelf in the background. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A male in his late 20s, olive skin with visible pores, an angular, heart-shaped face with a prominent chin. Very short dark brown buzz-cut hair, natural hairline. Narrow, deep-set round brown eyes, thick arched eyebrows. A slightly upturned nose with a broad bridge. Full, bow-shaped lips with a subtle, open-mouthed smile. Light stubble on the chin and upper lip, a few faint freckles across the nose. Playing with a golden retriever in a sunlit backyard, throwing a ball. Full-body shot, direct gaze. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

Full-body shot of a young East Asian man in his early 30s, olive skin, playing with a golden retriever in a sun-drenched backyard. He has a square jawline, a slightly longer, lean face, prominent cheekbones, and dark, buzz-cut hair. His eyes are round and dark brown, with a slight upward tilt, and his eyebrows are thin and arched. He has a broad, slightly upturned nose, and full, heart-shaped lips forming a wide, joyful smile. Light stubble covers his chin and upper lip. He's looking down at the dog with affection, holding a tennis ball. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

Full-body shot of a man in his early 30s with olive skin, playing with a dog and a ball in a sunny backyard. He has a broad jawline and a slightly wider face, with a prominent, slightly upturned nose. His eyes are deep-set, with a noticeable epicanthic fold and are closer together, a warm brown color. His lips are full and even, forming a joyful, open-mouthed smile. His hair is very short, dark brown, and buzz-cut, with visible stubble on his chin and upper lip.
